error_signature: Discord only allow max 2000 characters in message
title: Discord message exceeds character limit
symptom: When sending multiple messages through the Discord node, the second message fails due to exceeding the character limit.
not_this_if: Only one message is being sent
root_cause: Discord imposes a strict limit of 2000 characters per message. If the content being sent exceeds this limit, the Discord node will fail to send the message, resulting in an error.
fix_steps: Check the length of the message content being sent to Discord.
If the message exceeds 2000 characters, truncate or summarize the content to fit within the limit.
agent_instruction: Ensure that all messages sent through the Discord node are under 2000 characters.
